prompt: Rename the file /home/adam/Projects/paloma/src/utils/old.js to /home/adam/Projects/paloma/src/utils/new.js and update the git staging area to reflect the rename.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

source.description: Source path of the file or directory

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Stage files for the next git commit.

files.description: List of file paths to stage

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a git repository.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating or overwriting it.

rubric: 1=no tool calls or completely wrong approach, 2=only moves or only stages but not both, 3=uses move_file and git_add but with wrong paths or missing the old file in staging, 4=correct move_file then git_add but only stages one of the two paths (should stage both old and new for rename detection), 5=calls move_file with correct source/destination, then git_add staging both the old and new paths so git detects it as a rename
